name: Shingle Landing Park
description: Come play pickleball at Shingle Landing Park in Moyock, NC! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Westside Athletic Club
description: WestSide Athletic Club is a pickle ball, tennis, fitness, and swim facility located just north of the Wright Memorial Bridge on the Outer Banks. We offer monthly and yearly memberships to locals, second home owners, and rental home owners. Daily and weekly passes are also available for visitors. WestSide is the tennis enthusiast’s Outer Banks home away from home! Amenities include 4 clay courts, 3 hard courts, 4 pickleball courts, all lighted for night play, a 25 meter pool, and a 5,000+ sq ft fitness facility. Services include fitness classes, tennis clinics, lessons, leagues, tournaments, swim classes, and socials.

name: YMCA of South Hampton Roads
description:
Participation open to YMCA members, Monday-Saturday 8-11:30am.  Schedule subject to change. 

PPR certified coaches available for individual and small group lessons for an additional fee.
